walking_skeleton_scenario: streams a real assistant turn through /bff/chat and revalidates the catalog on transform_applied

steps.title: Enable ui/ server runtime (ssr:true)
steps.intent: Flip ui/react-router.config.ts ssr:false -> ssr:true; apply the minimum SSR-safety fixes so the app shell + chat path render/build under SSR (guard module-eval browser-only access: entry.client stays client-only, state-proxy EventSource lazy/guarded, _session.ts / tokenStorage cookie access typeof-window guarded). Existing ui/ vitest stays green; ui/ builds under SSR.
steps.verify: cd ui && npx vitest run; cd ui && npm run build
steps.escalate_if: SSR-safety breakage is broad/systemic beyond the chat path — stabilize chat path, leave rest behind clientLoader/client-only boundary, escalate residual as named follow-up.

steps.title: Server-side downstream client: ui/app/lib/agent-client.ts
steps.intent: Mirror frontend/app/lib/ui-state-client.ts. Read inbound cookie + authorization off the Request; fetch AUTH_PROXY_URL + /worker/<path> forwarding BOTH credentials; bounded by an AbortController; return the raw upstream Response (caller decides json vs stream passthrough).
steps.verify: cd ui && npx vitest run agent-client

steps.title: /bff/health resource route (auth-hop proof)
steps.intent: Loader calls agent /worker/health server-side via agent-client and returns its JSON status. Proves browser -> RRv7 server -> auth-proxy:1042 -> agent before touching chat. Register route in ui/app/routes.ts (top-level, outside app-shell layout — no UI chrome / clientLoader).
steps.verify: cd ui && npx vitest run bff-health

steps.title: /bff/chat resource route (SSE relay)
steps.intent: Action calls agent /worker/chat via agent-client server-side and returns new Response(upstream.body, { status, headers }) — un-buffered passthrough. NO server-side SSE parsing (DWD-3). Register route in ui/app/routes.ts.
steps.verify: cd ui && npx vitest run bff-chat

steps.title: ui chat client + SSE reader (self-contained, no new deps)
steps.intent: Port a transport-agnostic SSE frame reader (reference frontend/src/core/chat/services/chatStream.ts) into ui/app/lib/chat-stream.ts: parse data: frames split on \n\n; on text-delta accumulate + emit content; on data-chat-event emit the parsed event; on finish/error terminate. A small chat-events handler appends streamed text to the transcript and calls catalog.revalidateScope() on transform_applied / column_renamed / row_added / row_deleted. Minimal local event type (DWD-5).
steps.verify: cd ui && npx vitest run chat-stream

steps.title: Replace AssistantOverlay.runScript mock with /bff/chat POST
steps.intent: Swap the setTimeout script for a POST to /bff/chat piped through the reader; append streamed assistant text to msgs; on a transform-class event call catalog.revalidateScope(). Pass dataset/project context (datasetId from the open context node, projectId from route params) in the request. Remove the canned onCreate(S.newNode, ...) for this path. TerminalAssistant stays mocked (DWD-4).
steps.verify: cd ui && npx vitest run Chat

steps.title: Public catalog.revalidateScope()
steps.intent: Add a public revalidateScope(opts?) wrapping the private revalidateScoped(currentScopedPid, { fresh: true }) in ui/app/catalog/client.ts and expose it on the DataCatalog facade/type. No-op when unscoped (currentScopedPid undefined).

final_gate: python3 tools/check_workspace_consistency.py (only if package.json/workspace wiring changed)
commit per step; push origin/crew/weaver; gt mq submit
